examples: Would it be too forward of me to say I'll go wherever you go?I'd be honored, milord.
But... master, it is a dirty and smelly corpse! If the Milord knew it, he would scold you again!
Famous for singing ballads - Ms Piaf's songs include La Vie on Rose, Milord, La Foule - and Non, Je Ne Regrette Rien.
